text: <speak>Votre facture la plus récente comportait un crédit de $session.params.api.billingProfile.lastPaymentDetails.lastInvoiceAmount daté du <say-as interpret-as="date" format="md"> $session.params.api.billingProfile.playAccountBalanceDates.playlastBillingDate</say-as>.</speak>

<speak>Your most recent bill had a credit of $ $session.params.api.billingProfile.lastPaymentDetails.lastInvoiceAmount dated <say-as interpret-as="date" format="md"> $session.params.api.billingProfile.playAccountBalanceDates.playlastBillingDate</say-as>.</speak>
